=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (6:13-6:18) TS377006: It is recommended to use return yield* for Effects that never succeed to signal a definitive exit point for type narrowing and tooling support. effect(missingReturnYieldStar)
  Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Add return statement"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable missingReturnYieldStar for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Add return statement" ===

--- file:///.src/missingReturnYieldStar_yieldable.ts ---
import { Effect, Option } from "effect"

export const shouldComplain = (n: number) =>
    Effect.gen(function*() {
        if (n === 0) {
            return yield* Option.none(); // should trigger because Option<A> is yieldable
        }
        return n / 1
    })
